ddls:
CREATE TABLE "banks" (
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bank */,
  "bank_name" TEXT /* Name of the bank */,
  "bank_code" TEXT /* Bank code used for internal identification */,
  "swift_code" TEXT /* SWIFT code for international transactions */,
  "bank_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the bank */,
  "regulatory_code" TEXT /* Code representing the bank's regulatory status */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the bank */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the bank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bank associated with this account */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Account number for the banking account */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the currency used by the account */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date when the account was opened */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., checking, savings) */,
  "account_description" TEXT /* Description of the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the account involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of money transferred or received */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., debit, credit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, settled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, User) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry in the audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code representing the currency (e.g., USD, HKD) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Full name of the currency (e.g., United States Dollar, Hong Kong Dollar) */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Current exchange rate of the currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., unread, read) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user associated with the setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., notification preferences) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting (e.g., enabled/disabled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_info" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code representing the country (e.g., HK, US) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)
